work_experiences.title: Mergers & Acquisitions Analyst
work_experiences.description: Small & Mid Cap Cross-border M&A Boutique
work_experiences.note: Converted internship into full-time position; sole analyst in a 3-person team; trained 2 interns
accomplishments: End-to-end execution exposure in a lean 3-person deal team (sourcing, valuation, due diligence, negotiations, closing)
Led production of marketing materials, maintained buyer universes, and coordinated data room management across multiple concurrent mandates
Staffed on 7 live mandates (sell-side, buy-side, debt advisory) across healthcare, tech, and life sciences sectors with deal values ranging from EUR 5M to EUR 50M
Built detailed financial models (LBO, DCF, trading comps, precedent transactions) and prepared client presentations for Board meetings and investor pitches
Conducted comprehensive industry research and identified strategic buyers for cross-border deals spanning Europe, US, and Asia
Managed relationships with clients, advisors, and counterparties throughout transaction lifecycle
Performed quality of earnings analysis and identified key value drivers in target companies
Coordinated with legal, tax, and accounting advisors to structure transactions and negotiate deal terms
Developed expertise in healthcare IT, digital health, and life sciences sectors through deep sector analysis

missions.title: Tech, Software, and Financial Services Mandates
missions.description: Led sell-side mandates for a Swiss mortgage broker (~CHF 10M revenue, CHF 40M valuation), a Swiss gold broker (~CHF 50M revenue, CHF 4M debt financing), and a South African AI company (~CHF 10M valuation). Handled valuations, marketing documents, and buyer research.
missions.skills: financial modeling, valuation, investor outreach, pitch materials, cross-sector analysis, deal execution
missions.outcomes: 3 mandates managed end-to-end; ~CHF 100M total value; 30+ acquirers contacted

missions.title: Buy-Side & Restructuring Projects
missions.description: Supported a French landscaping leader entering the Swiss market (targets CHF 5–15M), advised a Swiss fitness chain in restructuring and sale, and assisted a PE fund on a hotel acquisition deal.
missions.skills: target sourcing, negotiation support, strategic screening, financial due diligence, market mapping
missions.outcomes: 5+ targets shortlisted; 1 fitness chain sold; PE buy-side support completed

missions.title: Healthcare, Industrial & Luxury Mandates
missions.description: Worked on sell-side projects for a daycare group (CHF 10M revenue, CHF 1M EBITDA, 7x multiple), a vertical SaaS healthcare company, a smart-home automation player, a century-old watchmaking brand, and an orthopedic network sold to a hospital group.
missions.skills: sector research, valuation benchmarking, process coordination, marketing documents, client presentations
missions.outcomes: 6 mandates managed; ~CHF 60M cumulative value; maintained direct client relationships

work_experiences.skills: financial modeling, valuation, buyer sourcing, deal execution, client management, leadership, training, multitasking
work_experiences.outcomes: Sole analyst in 3-person team; trained 2 interns; contributed to 10+ live mandates across multiple sectors

work_experiences.title: Mergers & Acquisitions Intern
work_experiences.description: Currently under LBO with Crédit Mutuel Equity
accomplishments: Worked directly with the CEO of Healthcare and Retail divisions on evaluating multiple acquisition targets in France and Belgium
Prepared investment memos including market analysis, competitive positioning, and financial projections for 3 potential acquisitions
Conducted financial and operational due diligence on targets with revenues of EUR 10M–30M
Analyzed market trends and competitive landscape in French healthcare and retail sectors
Built financial models to assess synergies and post-acquisition value creation opportunities
Supported post-acquisition integration planning for recent deals
work_experiences.skills: M&A analysis, target sourcing, due diligence, deal structuring, financial modeling, market research, integration planning
work_experiences.outcomes: 3 potential acquisitions analyzed; supported post-acquisition integration; enhanced cross-border M&A expertise

work_experiences.title: Financial Analyst Intern
accomplishments: Supported the CFO and Head of Controlling on FP&A and strategic projects for the Swiss subsidiary (CHF 50M+ revenues)
Built automated financial dashboards in Excel and PowerBI to track KPIs and performed variance analysis on monthly P&L results
Assisted in annual budget planning and quarterly forecasting for 5 business units
Developed a new cost allocation model to improve profitability analysis by service line
Prepared Board presentations on financial performance and strategic initiatives
Analyzed pricing strategies and their impact on profitability across customer segments
Conducted ad-hoc analysis on operational efficiency improvements and cost reduction opportunities
work_experiences.skills: financial planning, forecasting, business analysis, dashboard automation, PowerBI, strategic communication, variance analysis
work_experiences.outcomes: CHF 50M+ revenues analyzed; new profitability model implemented; improved financial reporting efficiency
